name: longtable-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the LongTable product surface and provider-neutral runtime packages

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @longtable/core && npm run build --workspace @longtable/memory && npm run build --workspace @longtable/checkpoints && npm run build --workspace @longtable/setup && npm run build --workspace @longtable/scholar-research && npm run build --workspace @longtable/research-search && npm run build --workspace @longtable/provider-codex && npm run build --workspace @longtable/provider-claude && npm run build --workspace @longtable/cli && npm run build --workspace @longtable/mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/memory && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/checkpoints && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/setup && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/scholar-research && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/research-search && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/provider-codex && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/provider-claude && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/cli && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/mcp
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run smoke:setup && npm run smoke:checkpoints && npm run smoke:hooks && npm run smoke:panel-handoff && npm run smoke:panel-workers && npm run smoke:research-spec-audit && npm run smoke:question-audit && npm run smoke:role-audit && npm run smoke:human-persona && npm run smoke:grilling-interview && npm run smoke:search && npm run smoke:scholar-research && npm run typecheck
scripts.release:check: npm run test && npm run pack:check
